PropertyInt.name: tunnelSweepSize
PropertyInt.help: Number of tunnels to be attempted in one sweep

PropertyInt.name: tunnelSetupTimeout
PropertyInt.help: Time to wait before declaring tunnel setup attempt failed

PropertyInt.name: numRetries
PropertyInt.help: Number of retries when tunnel negotiation timeout

PropertyInt.name: retryInterval
PropertyInt.help: Time to wait before retry the tunnel creation attempt

PropertyInt.name: retryDelay
PropertyInt.help: To put a delay beween subsequent attempts
